title: Sygikal's Datapack Assets
body:
Required resources for my datapacks.


It includes the assets from [Realistic Health](https://modrinth.com/datapack/realistic-health), [Copper Wrench](https://modrinth.com/datapack/copperwrench), [Mario 64 Paintings](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mario-64-paintings), [Miner's Helmet](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mining-helmet),
and [Copper Horn](https://modrinth.com/datapack/copper-horn).

Its design goal is to be simple, non-intrusive, and functional with other resource packs.
